title: Namuang Waterfall Easy Hike
shortDesc: A short jungle hike to Samui's most beautiful waterfall — a natural swimming hole kids love.
description: The Namuang Waterfall hike is one of the easiest and most rewarding short treks on Koh Samui. The trail is mostly flat with a gentle incline, taking about 20 minutes through lush jungle to reach a stunning 20-metre waterfall with a natural swimming pool at its base. Kids love splashing in the cool water. The lower falls are accessible with a stroller.
